symptoms: Runnable and draft semantics can drift from fixture evidence
operational_impact: Gate denominator or blocker reports can become misleading
suspected_root_cause: Dataset status is config-driven and must match contracts metadata and tests

symptoms: Derived dry-weight datasets can look like direct measured DW if review flags are hidden
operational_impact: Scientific claims and promotion reports can overstate evidence
suspected_root_cause: Scorecard payloads need explicit direct-vs-derived fields

symptoms: Local KNU fixture paths are needed but raw/private data cannot be committed
operational_impact: Runtime validation can work locally while PR review must remain safe
suspected_root_cause: Contract template plus gitignore must carry the boundary

symptoms: RAH restart packets can point at retired issue branches after merges
operational_impact: Future sessions can resume stale branches or scopes
suspected_root_cause: RAH sidecar is local control-plane state and should be ignored unless explicitly promoted

symptoms: Mixed measured gate can be confused with public promotion semantics
operational_impact: Review can block if public/private semantics are not separated
suspected_root_cause: Config names and docs must keep mixed/public lanes explicit

symptoms: Lane-matrix output root is expected but absent in the current worktree
operational_impact: Architecture readers may assume a realized lane-matrix artifact exists
suspected_root_cause: Gate/scorecard scripts exist but output must be generated by an explicit experiment run

symptoms: Project field names or gh auth scope changes can break helper scripts
operational_impact: Issue/PR workflow automation can partially succeed and leave Status stale
suspected_root_cause: PowerShell helpers wrap gh project APIs and need verification after network errors
